allow: PowerShell(Get-Command magick, pdftoppm, pdf2svg, inkscape, gs, gswin64c -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell($tools = @\('magick.exe','pdftoppm.exe','pdf2svg.exe','inkscape.exe','gswin64c.exe','gs.exe','convert.exe','mutool.exe'\); foreach\($t in $tools\){ $c = Get-Command $t -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\($c\){ Write-Output "FOUND: $\($c.Source\)" } else { Write-Output "MISSING: $t" } })

PowerShell($tools = @\('node.exe','npm.cmd','npx.cmd','python.exe','python3.exe','py.exe'\); foreach\($t in $tools\){ $c = Get-Command $t -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\($c\){ Write-Output "FOUND: $\($c.Source\)" } else { Write-Output "MISSING: $t" } })
